feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Downpayments Journal Entries
entry.content:
Hi

I have created down payment for 5 items & have billed all the 5 materials by mistake. Out of the 5 item, 1 item is in backorder which I want to bill latter as it is in back order (June 2024). The journal entries for the 5th item is cleared along with the other item.

Q1) If I reject the journal entry for 5th item now, can I be able to bill it latter when the product is actually shipped in June to the customer how it will behave.

Q2) In case of partial shipments there are items in back order how can we avoid those from getting bill. The billing block under the billing document tab is one possible answer for this & it needs to be done for each item separately. Is there a possible solution without setting the billing block manually for each item, invoice only gets generated for instock item & for back orders it doesn't generate invoice.

Thanks in advance for the support

entry.title: Import Vendor invoice on Public cloud
entry.content:
I am currently engaged in a Public Cloud project. We are creating vendor invoices, and there is a need for Importing vendor invoice. We wish to use the FI post periods for the invoices.

We have found a import app for supplier invoice, but is there a way to post vendor invoice by importing, or is there a way to use FI post periods for supplier invoices.

Thank you and Regards,

entry.title: Define Storage Bin Structure
entry.content: I would like Define Storage Bin Structure like on screen but still I have error message. Please for advice how I should resolve the problem.

entry.title: PO accruals with prepayments - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts, 

We received the question from our customer about how to handle PO accruals with prepayments. 

What is the best practice to use when for example a PO is created for a certain service and 10% of the PO is paid before the GR is posted or the invoice comes in. 

Thank you for your input in advance! 

Kind regards,

Vanessa

entry.title: I am looking for a report for Order Intake and Revenue.
entry.content:
Hi Community experts,

We have a business requirement where the business needs a report which contains Order Intake and Revenue values which would in turn gives us the information for Order Backlog.

Any leads on this topics would be really helpful and looking for any work around solution as well if there is no standard reports not available.

Regards,

Evans Aarons

entry.title: Data extension Form for Digitally Signed Billing Documents (Portugal)
entry.content:
I need to extend the data source FDP_V3_BD_STANDARD_GLO_PT_SRV in order to add the outbound delivery number.

I have already tried to use the custom fields app, I tried to find this data source in the data source extension tab but I wasn't able to find it. I then tried to create a custom field (then i would apply a custom logic to it) under the Sales: Billing Document (SD_BILLINGDOC) business context but I was not able to find usage for the billing form templates.

Can you please help me find a way to solve this?

Thank you in advance

entry.title: withholding tax reports
entry.content:
Are withholding tax reports available in S/4HANA public cloud?
For example, a report that displays line items with withholding tax codes.
This is a Japanese requirement.

entry.title: How to Connect Business User Group to Business Role group?
entry.content:
Hello dear SAP Community, 

In s4 Hana public cloud i can creat Business User Group and Business Role Group. It would make a lot of Sense to Assign these Groups to each other, to minimize Administration work. 

So my Question is: Is it Possible to Assign a Bussines User group to a Business Role Group?

Context:  Solved: Is it possible to restrict which Business Role is ... - SAP Community

This functionality is the Maintain Business User Groups and Maintain Businsess Role Groups.

With Maintain Business User Groups app you can create business user groups and assign multiple business users to them. This helps you to organize your area and easily search for all business users of a certain category (for example to assign them to business roles). Grouping also facilitates maintenance of authorizations. If you are the super administrator for all areas, you can delegate this task to administrators for the relevant areas, such as Financials. In this case, you would create a business user group for Financials.

With Maintain Business Roles Groups app you can create business role groups and assign multiple business roles to them. This helps you to organize your area and easily search for all business roles of a certain category (for example to assign business users to them). Grouping also facilitates maintenance of authorizations. If you are the super administrator for all areas, you can delegate this task to administrators for the relevant areas, such as Financials. In this case, you would create a business role group for Financials and allow to assign these business roles only to particular user groups. 

 

For more information, you can check the following documentations:

SAP Blog Post | How to use the Maintain Business User Groups functionality

SAP Blog Post | How to use the Maintain Business Role Groups functionality

entry.title: Deletion of material groups
entry.content: In the baseline activation Service, several Materials Groups have been identified. These MG are no longer necessary and are causing confusion for the end users. I've seen this issue discussed in the SAP community "How can we delete a material group?", but this question is already years ago. Is it possible to delete these material groups?

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud : AVC_ variant condition key in sales and characteristic values assignment
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are not able to assign the variant condition key in sales pricing to the material characteristics values in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.  we are using Advanced Variant Configuration (AVC). 

Please advise on how to assign material characteristic values to the variant condition key in sales pricing.  We had attempted to create variant condition key in VC modelling environment and the same is used for pricing in condition record  creation using PVA0 condition type. However there is no linkage between selected material variants in the sales order and the applicable price increase due to this variant selection.  

I am missing the link between the material characteristic value and variant condition key in sales pricing. 

I had attached screenshot.

Please advise. 

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: SAP Subscription Billing S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a customer that has SAP Subscription Billing, S/4HANA Public Cloud solution in place. 

For the integration part they have Salesforce integration with SAP Subscription Billing and S/4.

One clarification I have here is we are facing lot of challenges with SAP Subscription Billing having Event Broker, replication issues in place and customer wants to go live in a couple of months which is not realistic to happen for these issues to be resolved.

The products that this customer have has all the subscription services they do but is there a way we can skip using Subscription Billing and directly create Subscriptions using API calls in S/4? First question is, is this possible and second question is how to approach this subscriptions items till invoicing? Because I tried by creating a sales order or sales contract, but system didn't allow because there was no assigned combination of item category maintained for the subscription items.

Please advise on the above. @stefan_kiene @shpresimshabaj 

SAP Subscription Billing SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management, subscription order management SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales SD (Sales and Distribution) 

Thanks,

Brinda S

entry.title: Freely definable attributes in Customer master (KATR1-KATR10)
entry.content:
Hello All,

We are using SAP S/4 Public Cloud Edition and customer wanted to maintain their current system account ID in any one of the customer master data fields available in SAP Business Partner, I know that there are 10 freely defined attributes can be configured, but what is the length of these attribute value? Customer has account ID which is maximum of 30 characters. Is it possible to use these attribute fields for this?

Please advise.

SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition SD (Sales and Distribution) SAP S/4HANA business partner SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sales 

Thanks!

entry.title: #CoE#JYPE Apply substitute rule While using Manage Automatic Payment App.
entry.content:
Hi Community!

Clients want to enter TEXT in the Payment Document's text field (Header Text and Bank Line Text) created when running the Manage Automatic Payment App.


Is it possible to apply the ECC version of F110 payment document TEXT substition ABAP logic to Cloud ABAP logic?

I would appreciate it if you could let me know the applicable Cloud abap sample code.

-- ECC/PCE rule example --

*--------------------------------------------------------------------*

* FORM U300

*--------------------------------------------------------------------*

* Clearing A/P

*--------------------------------------------------------------------*

FORM U300 USING BOOL_DATA TYPE GB002_015.

* BOOL_DATA TYPE GB002_012.

* BOOL_DATA TYPE GB002_013.

 

DATA : BEGIN OF LT_DOC OCCURS 0,

BUKRS LIKE BSEG-BUKRS,

GJAHR LIKE BSEG-GJAHR,

BELNR LIKE BKPF-BELNR,

WRBTR LIKE BSEG-WRBTR,

END OF LT_DOC.

 

DATA : LV_STRU TYPE STRING,

LS_BSEG TYPE BSEG.

 

DATA : LV_BKTXT TYPE BKTXT.

 

FIELD-SYMBOLS: <FS_REGUH> TYPE REGUH.

 

 

CLEAR LV_BKTXT.

 

CHECK BKPF-BLART EQ 'ZP'.

CHECK BKPF-TCODE EQ 'F110'.

 

* LOGIC for reading Original Documents during AUTO PAYMENT

* Assign REGUH reference area in SAPF110S payment program

LV_STRU = '(SAPF110S)REGUH'.

 

ASSIGN (LV_STRU) TO <FS_REGUH>.

 

CHECK SY-SUBRC EQ 0.

 

CHECK <FS_REGUH> IS NOT INITIAL.

 

CLEAR : LT_DOC, LT_DOC[].

SELECT ZBUKR AS BUKRS

BELNR

GJAHR

WRBTR

INTO CORRESPONDING FIELDS OF TABLE LT_DOC

FROM REGUP

WHERE LAUFD EQ <FS_REGUH>-LAUFD

AND LAUFI EQ <FS_REGUH>-LAUFI.

 

SORT LT_DOC BY WRBTR DESCENDING.

 

READ TABLE LT_DOC INDEX 1.

CLEAR LV_BKTXT.

SELECT SINGLE BKTXT

INTO LV_BKTXT

FROM BKPF

WHERE BUKRS EQ LT_DOC-BUKRS

AND BELNR EQ LT_DOC-BELNR

AND GJAHR EQ LT_DOC-GJAHR.

 

MOVE LV_BKTXT TO BKPF-BKTXT.

 

LOOP AT BOOL_DATA-BSEG INTO LS_BSEG.

MOVE LV_BKTXT TO LS_BSEG-SGTXT.

MODIFY BOOL_DATA-BSEG FROM LS_BSEG.

CLEAR LS_BSEG.

ENDLOOP.

 

ENDFORM. "U300

 

refence URL: <https://adonishansap.blogspot.com/2017/02/zrggbs000.html>

entry.title: Project scheduling in SAP S/4 HANA Cloud, Private Edition
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there any proposed solution or workaround solutions for project scheduling in cloud?
In HANA, we can schedule via T-code CJ20N.

Thanks.

Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: Maintain Export PDF for Balance Sheet/Income Statement
entry.content: Can I add a logo from the PDF export results to the Balance Sheet/Income Statement?

entry.title: Maintain the fields on the correspondence form
entry.content: Our client has a request to add a spelled field ‘Terbilang’ (changing the number 'AmountInTransactionCurrency' to text) using Indonesian on the form. whereas in the FormCalc code provided by Adobe LiveCycle only the WordNum syntax is changing the number 'AmountInTransactionCurrency' into English text

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud and Embedded PP/DS
entry.content:
Hello, what is the actual situation with the subj?

Based on this comment, PP/DS wasn't a part of S/4HANA Public Cloud, but many things have changed since then.

entry.title: Unable to see the negative values for the Reversed Material
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Greetings of the day!!

In the application "Material document Overview", all the postings of materials are in positive values which may be goods receipts, goods postings and goods reversals. 

Receipts of goods, good issues and Reversals can be identified only by the movement type. There is no identification of negative sign for reversals as there is a identification in MB51 in ECC version.

Are there any hidden settings to turn on the signs for the quantity's that are reversed (means for 262 movements) if not please help with the suitable application which has signs for the Reversed material.

 

Regards,

Yaswanth. 

MM Purchasing 

MM Inventory Management

entry.title: DRC - No file type for message type TR_RECEIPT_PULL
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

eDocument (General) for DRC in Public Cloud: Handle Incoming Messages
When I run it, I get an error as follows. How can I solve this?
No file type for message type TR_RECEIPT_PULL found in the EDOMSGTYPEPULL view
Thanks everyone

entry.title: Is the mixed costing functionality an option or available for the cloud public edition?
entry.content:
We do a few parts we buy or make and subcontract as well. For cost estimate, we would like to explore mixed costing to get accurate estimates . Is mixed costing available for the cloud public edition?  I have searched the community and KBA's. I was not able to find anything useful. Please advise.

 

Thanks
